---
title: "4. Effect Size"
author: "[Massimiliano Pastore](https://dpss.psy.unipd.it/~massimiliano.pastore/index.html)"
date: 06.04.2026
---

<br>

Slides sugli Effect Sizes

<a href="slides/effect-sizes-slides.pdf" download="effect-sizes-slides.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Scarica slides (pdf)
</a>
